channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [JAYKAY] Jaykay Enterprises' JK Digital Gets ISO 13485 & ISO 9001
item.description:
Jaykay Enterprises Ltd's wholly-owned subsidiary, JK Digital & Advance Systems Private Limited, has been awarded ISO 13485:2016 and ISO 9001:2015 certifications by BSCIC Certifications Private Limited. These certifications are for the manufacture and sale of additive manufactured sterile revision surgery hip implants, augments, spinal implants, and patient-specific implants. The certifications mark a milestone for JK Digital’s medical implants business and enable end-to-end manufacturing solutions using additive manufacturing.

  • JK Digital awarded ISO 13485:2016 and ISO 9001:2015 certifications.
  • Certifications cover manufacturing and sale of additive manufactured sterile implants.
  • The certifications pave the way for end-to-end manufacturing solutions.
  • BSCIC Certifications Private Limited issued the certifications.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JAYKAY ENTERPRISES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SONATSOFTW] Sonata Software Appoints Rajsekhar Datta Roy as CEO
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sonata Software Ltd announced the appointment of Rajsekhar Datta Roy as Chief Executive Officer, effective May 9, 2026, for a three-year term. He succeeds Samir Dhir, who will step down on May 8, 2026, and continue as an Advisor to the Board until December 31, 2026. Raj brings over three decades of experience and has been instrumental in expanding Sonata Software's Dynamics and Microsoft practices. The Board expressed appreciation for Samir Dhir's leadership during his tenure.

  • Rajsekhar Datta Roy appointed CEO of Sonata Software, effective May 9, 2026.
  • Samir Dhir to step down as Managing Director and CEO on May 8, 2026.
  • Samir Dhir will continue as an Advisor to the Board until December 31, 2026.
  • Raj brings 30+ years of experience in scaling technology practices.
  • Raj played a key role in advancing Sonata Software’s transformation into an AI-first organization.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SONATA SOFTWARE LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [GARGI] PNGS Gargi Fashion Jewellery Opens Exclusive Brand Store in Amravati
item.description:
🔥 Trending

PNGS Gargi Fashion Jewellery Ltd has announced the opening of its new exclusive brand store located on the Ground Floor of Tapadia City Centre, Mouje Saturna, Gopal Nagar Square, Opp. Khandelwal Lawns, Amravati- 444607. The store was inaugurated on April 26, 2026.

  • PNGS Gargi Fashion Jewellery opens a new exclusive brand store.
  • The store is located in Tapadia City Centre, Amravati.
  • The store was inaugurated on April 26, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PNGS Gargi Fashion Jewellery Ltd | Category: Expansion

item.title: [AVANTEL] Avantel Rights Issue Funds Utilized Appropriately
item.description:
Avantel Ltd's monitoring agency report for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, confirms that the proceeds from the Rights Issue of equity shares, made vide its Letter of Offer dated May 5, 2025, have been utilized appropriately for the objects mentioned in the offer document. CARE Ratings Limited, the monitoring agency, issued the report in compliance with SEBI regulations.

  • Avantel's Rights Issue funds utilized as per offer document.
  • Monitoring Agency Report issued by CARE Ratings Limited.
  • Report complies with SEBI regulations.
  • Rights Issue was for ₹80.91 crore.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AVANTEL LTD. | Category: Rights Issue

item.title: [RMDRIP] R M Drip & Sprinklers: SEBI Search at Promoter Premises
item.description:
🔥 Trending

R M Drip and Sprinklers Systems Ltd. announced that a search proceeding was initiated by SEBI at the premises of the Promoter Directors on April 22-23, 2026, under Section 11C (9) of the SEBI Act, 1992. The company states that currently, the search has no material impact on the financials, business operations, or other activities. Further disclosures will be made if any material updates arise as per SEBI regulations.

  • SEBI conducted a search at the premises of R M Drip and Sprinklers' Promoter Directors.
  • The search proceeding was initiated under Section 11C (9) of the SEBI Act, 1992.
  • The company reports no material impact on financials or operations at this time.
  • R M Drip and Sprinklers will disclose any material updates as required by SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: R M Drip and Sprinklers Systems Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [AVANTEL] Avantel Appoints Two New Independent Directors
item.description:
Avantel Ltd has appointed Dr. Tamilmani Kandasamy and Mr. Lakshminarasimha Acharyulu Muktevi as Non-Executive Independent Directors for a term of 5 years, effective from April 26, 2026, to April 25, 2031. The appointments were approved during the Board of Directors meeting held on April 26, 2026. The board also approved the reconstitution of various committees and the appointment of Statutory, Cost, and Internal Auditors, subject to member approval where applicable.

  • Dr. Tamilmani Kandasamy and Mr. Lakshminarasimha Acharyulu Muktevi appointed as Non-Executive Independent Directors.
  • Appointments effective from April 26, 2026, to April 25, 2031, for a 5-year term.
  • Board approved reconstitution of Audit, Nomination & Remuneration, Stakeholders Relationship, and CSR Committees.
  • M/s. Grandhy & Co. appointed as Statutory Auditors for five years, subject to AGM approval.
  • M/s. MPR & Associates and M/s. Ramesh & Co. appointed as Cost and Internal Auditors, respectively, for FY ending March 31, 2027.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AVANTEL LTD. | Category: Corporate Governance

item.title: [DUCON] Ducon Board Approves Share Capital Increase
item.description:
Ducon Infratechnologies Ltd's board has approved an increase in authorized share capital and the conversion of unsecured loans from Promoter and Managing Director, Mr. Arun Govil, into equity shares, subject to shareholder approval. An Extraordinary General Meeting is scheduled for May 20, 2026, to seek shareholder approval for these resolutions. In FY25, Ducon reported consolidated Total Income of ₹451 Cr, EBITDA of ₹31 Cr, and Net Profit of ₹14 Cr.

  • Ducon Board approves increase in authorized share capital, pending shareholder approval.
  • Promoter loan conversion into equity approved, reinforcing balance sheet.
  • Extraordinary General Meeting scheduled for May 20, 2026, for shareholder approvals.
  • FY25 consolidated Total Income reported at ₹451 Cr.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ducon Infratechnologies Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AVANTEL] Avantel Appoints Grandhy & Co. as Statutory Auditors, New Directors
item.description:
Avantel Ltd's Board of Directors, at a meeting on April 26, 2026, approved several key changes. The company appointed M/s. Grandhy & Co., Chartered Accountants, as its Statutory Auditors for a five-year term, subject to shareholder approval. Additionally, M/s. MPR & Associates were appointed as Cost Auditor and M/s. Ramesh & Co. as Internal Auditor for the financial year ending March 31, 2027. The Board also appointed Dr. Tamilmani Kandasamy and Mr. Lakshminarasimha Acharyulu Muktevi as Additional Non-Executive Independent Directors for a five-year period. Furthermore, the company announced the reconstitution of its Audit, Nomination & Remuneration, Stakeholders Relationship, and Corporate Social Responsibility Committees.

  • Avantel appointed Grandhy & Co. as Statutory Auditors for five years.
  • Two independent directors, Dr. Tamilmani Kandasamy and Mr. Lakshminarasimha Acharyulu Muktevi, were appointed.
  • Cost and Internal Auditors were also appointed for FY27.
  • Four key Board Committees, including the Audit Committee, were reconstituted.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AVANTEL LTD. | Category: Auditor

item.title: [AVANTEL] Avantel Appoints Additional Directors & Statutory Auditors
item.description:
Avantel Ltd's board, in its meeting on April 26, 2026, approved the appointment of Dr. Tamilmani Kandasamy and Mr. Lakshminarasimha Acharyulu Muktevi as Additional Directors (Non-Executive - Independent) for a 5-year term. The board also approved the reconstitution of various committees and the appointment of M/s. Grandhy & Co. as Statutory Auditors for five years, subject to member approval. Additionally, M/s. MPR & Associates were appointed as Cost Auditor and M/s. Ramesh & Co. as Internal Auditor for the financial year ending March 31, 2027.

  • Dr. Tamilmani Kandasamy appointed as Additional Director (Independent) for 5 years.
  • Mr. Lakshminarasimha Acharyulu Muktevi appointed as Additional Director (Independent) for 5 years.
  • M/s. Grandhy & Co. appointed as Statutory Auditors for 5 years, subject to AGM approval.
  • M/s. MPR & Associates appointed as Cost Auditor for FY ending March 31, 2027.
  • M/s. Ramesh & Co. appointed as Internal Auditor for FY ending March 31, 2027.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AVANTEL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AVANTEL] Avantel Approves FY26 Results, Recommends ₹0.20 Dividend
item.description:
Avantel Ltd's board approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. They recommended a final dividend of ₹0.20 per equity share (10%) for FY26, subject to shareholder approval. The board also approved the appointment of Dr. K. Tamilmani and Mr. Lakshminarasimha Acharyulu Muktevi as Additional Directors and reconstituted various committees. Furthermore, they approved increasing borrowing limits to ₹350 crore and appointed M/s. Grandhy & Co. as Statutory Auditors, M/s. MPR & Associates as Cost Auditor and M/s. Ramesh & Co. as Internal Auditor.

  • Audited FY26 financial results (standalone and consolidated) approved.
  • Final dividend of ₹0.20 per share (10%) recommended for FY26.
  • Dr. K. Tamilmani and Mr. Lakshminarasimha Acharyulu appointed as Additional Directors.
  • Borrowing limits increased from ₹200 crore to ₹350 crore, subject to shareholder approval.
  • M/s. Grandhy & Co. appointed as Statutory Auditors for five years, subject to member approval.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AVANTEL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
